description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a white brick exterior, a dark gabled roof, and large rectangular windows on the front and side facades. The front features a paved driveway with a parked car, a small porch with a central entrance, and two symmetrical garden beds. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, green lawn, trees, and outdoor furniture including a ping pong table and lounge chairs. The interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms including bedrooms, a kitchen, and living spaces, all arranged in an open, accessible plan. The property is enclosed by a low wall, providing a sense of privacy while maintaining an open view of the garden and recreational areas. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a focus on indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story white brick bungalow with a dark gabled roof, large windows, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway with a car, symmetrical windows, and small garden beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the driveway, and the arrangement of interior rooms.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying large windows, interior living spaces, and a partial view of the backyard with trees.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the backyard with a swimming pool, green lawn, trees, outdoor furniture, and the back facade of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with large side and rear windows
